nodes.text:
function createKeyPair<"Hex">(options?: Secp256k1.createKeyPair.Options<"Hex"> | undefined): Secp256k1.createKeyPair.ReturnType<"Hex">
namespace createKeyPair
nodes.docs: Creates a new secp256k1 ECDSA key pair consisting of a private key and its corresponding public key.
tags:
```ts twoslash
import { Secp256k1 } from 'ox'

const { privateKey, publicKey } = Secp256k1.createKeyPair()
```
options - The options to generate the key pair.
The generated key pair containing both private and public keys.

nodes.text:
function toHex(publicKey: PublicKey.PublicKey<boolean>, options?: PublicKey.toHex.Options): Hex
namespace toHex
tags: publicKey - The public key to serialize.

nodes.text:
function compress(publicKey: PublicKey.PublicKey<false>): PublicKey.PublicKey<true>
namespace compress
tags: publicKey - The public key to compress.
